Get A Free Audit

Transparent Pricing, Real Results

Your management fee scales with your ad spend. As your budget grows, the percentage decreases. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts.

Percentage of Ad Spend

Management Fee

Variable Fee
20% up to $30k/month 15% from $30k–$60k 10% above $60k
Calculated per platform
Minimum Fee $1,500/mo per platform
Monthly Cap $15,000
Onboarding $1,500 per platform
Get Started

The $1,500 minimum fee per platform acts as a floor, covering your first $7,500 in ad spend. Once you spend over $7,500, the 20% rate naturally takes over.

How It Scales

Your management fee drops at $30,000 and again at $60,000 per platform. The $15,000 monthly cap means your costs stay predictable even as you grow.

Monthly Management Fee by Ad Spend

How It Works

1

Under $30k/month per platform

Your fee is 20% of ad spend per platform, with a $1,500 minimum. This keeps your costs low as you ramp up and test campaigns.

2

$30k–$60k/month per platform

The rate drops to 15% on spend above $30,000. You save more as your budget scales.

3

$60k+/month per platform

Above $60,000, the rate drops to 10%. And your total fee never exceeds $15,000/month regardless of how much you spend.

Ready to grow? Let's talk.

Book a free strategy call and we will walk through your ad spend, goals, and what your management fee would look like.
